---
title: PMU
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557466/gensaucafe_20220319_af7z8u.png
description: Gens au café
categories: [urbansketch]
date: 2022/03/19
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557466/gensaucafe_20220319_af7z8u.png)
